final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-grade Chinese ethnic costume infographic for a national-museum exhibition panel.

Style/medium: needs a national-museum exhibition panel aesthetic with archival, restrained, professional collectible quality — exact paper texture and print finish are yours
Composition: must include top header zone (Chinese title / subtitle / intro), left structural breakdown zone with Chinese callout lines and detail close-ups, upper-right material/texture zone with real fabric swatches and captions, mid-right pattern/color/symbolism zone with color swatches and cultural explanations, bottom wearing-sequence flowchart and core feature summary
Subject: must include one complete Chinese ethnic minority costume ensemble as central subject (full-figure if human-appropriate, or central structural diagram if object-focused)
Scene/backdrop: must be rice-white / silk-paper-white / pale tea-tone paper texture background
Lighting/medium: needs archival museum display lighting — exact light source placement is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained, scholarly palette with authentic ethnic textile colors against neutral paper ground — exact color values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include realistic fabric textures (embroidery, weaving, metalwork, leather, beadwork) with material differentiation visible
Text (verbatim): must include Chinese main title and subtitle at top, Chinese callout labels for structural components on left, Chinese captions for material/texture samples, Chinese explanations for pattern symbolism and color meaning, Chinese wearing-sequence labels and core feature summary at bottom — all text must be clear, regular, readable Simplified Chinese, no garbled characters, no English, no pinyin
Constraints: must preserve museum infographic format (not poster / studio photo / e-commerce / anime style), must include structural accuracy, material authenticity, cultural annotations, must avoid poster aesthetics / studio portrait aesthetics / e-commerce aesthetics / anime aesthetics / cosplay aesthetics / mislabeled components / incorrect structures / blurred text / fake materials / excessive decoration
Avoid: poster feeling, studio portrait feeling, e-commerce feeling, anime feeling, cosplay feeling, mislabeled parts, incorrect structures, blurred text, fake materials, over-decoration
